title: Robust Smoky Canadian Lamb Kebabs
description: A smoky and crumbly Canadian dish featuring fresh thyme and tandoor flavors, perfect for a festive low-carb meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, using wood chips to create a smoky flavor.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the chopped thyme, tandoor spice mix, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the lamb skewers with olive oil and sprinkle with the thyme and spice mixture.
Grill the lamb skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Brush the lamb with lemon juice during the last minute of cooking.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb kebabs hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
